Logic Analysis: database/migrations/2024_01_01_000001_create_user_feature_permission_table.php
Creates user_feature_permission table with FK to users, clients, features. Depends on existing users, clients, features tables.
database/migrations/2024_01_01_000002_create_opt_pocket_expense_type_table.php
Creates opt_pocket_expense_type lookup table. No dependencies on other new tables.
database/migrations/2024_01_01_000003_create_pocket_expense_source_client_config_table.php
Creates pocket_expense_source_client_config table with FK to clients. Depends on existing clients table.
database/migrations/2024_01_01_000004_create_pocket_expense_table.php
Creates pocket_expense table with FK to users, clients, opt_pocket_expense_type. Depends on migrations 000001-000002.
database/migrations/2024_01_01_000005_create_pocket_expense_metadata_table.php
Creates pocket_expense_metadata table with FK to pocket_expense and existing tables. Depends on migration 000004.
database/migrations/2024_01_01_000006_create_pocket_expense_file_uploads_table.php
Creates pocket_expense_file_uploads table with FK to users, clients. No dependencies on other new tables.
database/migrations/2024_01_01_000007_create_pocket_expense_uploads_data_table.php
Creates pocket_expense_uploads_data table with FK to pocket_expense_file_uploads. Depends on migration 000006.
database/factories/UserFeaturePermissionFactory.php
Factory for UserFeaturePermission model. Depends on UserFeaturePermission migration and model.
database/factories/OptPocketExpenseTypeFactory.php
Factory for OptPocketExpenseType model. Depends on OptPocketExpenseType migration and model.
database/factories/PocketExpenseSourceClientConfigFactory.php
Factory for PocketExpenseSourceClientConfig model. Depends on PocketExpenseSourceClientConfig migration and model.
database/factories/PocketExpenseFactory.php
Factory for PocketExpense model. Depends on PocketExpense migration and model.
database/factories/PocketExpenseMetadataFactory.php
Factory for PocketExpenseMetadata model. Depends on PocketExpenseMetadata migration and model.
database/factories/PocketExpenseFileUploadFactory.php
Factory for PocketExpenseFileUpload model. Depends on PocketExpenseFileUpload migration and model.
database/factories/PocketExpenseUploadsDataFactory.php
Factory for PocketExpenseUploadsData model. Depends on PocketExpenseUploadsData migration and model.
app/Models/UserFeaturePermission.php
Eloquent model with relationships to User, Client, Feature. Depends on user_feature_permission migration.
app/Models/OptPocketExpenseType.php
Eloquent model with hasMany relationship to PocketExpense. Depends on opt_pocket_expense_type migration.
app/Models/PocketExpenseSourceClientConfig.php
Eloquent model with relationships to Client and PocketExpense. Depends on pocket_expense_source_client_config migration.
app/Models/PocketExpense.php
Eloquent model with relationships to User, Client, OptPocketExpenseType, PocketExpenseMetadata. Depends on pocket_expense migration.
app/Models/PocketExpenseMetadata.php
Eloquent model with relationships to PocketExpense and existing entities. Depends on pocket_expense_metadata migration.
app/Models/PocketExpenseFileUpload.php
Eloquent model with relationships to User, Client, PocketExpenseUploadsData. Depends on pocket_expense_file_uploads migration.
app/Models/PocketExpenseUploadsData.php
Eloquent model with relationship to PocketExpenseFileUpload. Depends on pocket_expense_uploads_data migration.
app/Policies/UserFeaturePermissionPolicy.php
Authorization policy for UserFeaturePermission operations. Depends on UserFeaturePermission model and User model.
app/Policies/PocketExpensePolicy.php
Authorization policy for PocketExpense operations including approval rights. Depends on PocketExpense and User models.
app/Policies/PocketExpenseSourcePolicy.php
Authorization policy for PocketExpenseSourceClientConfig operations. Depends on PocketExpenseSourceClientConfig and User models.
app/Http/Requests/StoreUserFeaturePermissionRequest.php
Form request validation for creating UserFeaturePermission. Depends on UserFeaturePermissionPolicy.
app/Http/Requests/UpdateUserFeaturePermissionRequest.php
Form request validation for updating UserFeaturePermission. Depends on UserFeaturePermissionPolicy.
app/Http/Requests/StorePocketExpenseRequest.php
Form request validation for creating PocketExpense. Depends on PocketExpensePolicy.
app/Http/Requests/UpdatePocketExpenseRequest.php
Form request validation for updating PocketExpense. Depends on PocketExpensePolicy.
app/Http/Requests/StorePocketExpenseSourceRequest.php
Form request validation for creating PocketExpenseSourceClientConfig. Depends on PocketExpenseSourcePolicy.
app/Http/Requests/UpdatePocketExpenseSourceRequest.php
Form request validation for updating PocketExpenseSourceClientConfig. Depends on PocketExpenseSourcePolicy.
app/Http/Requests/UploadPocketExpenseCSVRequest.php
Form request validation for CSV file upload. No policy dependency for file upload validation.
app/Services/UserFeaturePermissionService.php
Business logic for user permission management. Depends on UserFeaturePermission model.
app/Services/PocketExpenseService.php
Business logic for expense CRUD operations. Depends on PocketExpense and related models.
app/Services/PocketExpenseSourceService.php
Business logic for expense source configuration. Depends on PocketExpenseSourceClientConfig model.
app/Services/PocketExpenseCSVValidator.php
CSV validation service with reference data preloading. Depends on all expense-related models.
app/Services/PocketExpenseFXService.php
FX conversion service with rate lookup and commission calculation. Depends on existing FX infrastructure.
app/Jobs/ProcessExpenseUpload.php
Background job for processing validated CSV data. Depends on PocketExpenseFileUpload and related services.
app/Http/Resources/UserFeaturePermissionResource.php
API resource transformer for UserFeaturePermission. Depends on UserFeaturePermission model.
app/Http/Resources/PocketExpenseResource.php
API resource transformer for PocketExpense with relationships. Depends on PocketExpense model.
app/Http/Resources/PocketExpenseSourceResource.php
API resource transformer for PocketExpenseSourceClientConfig. Depends on PocketExpenseSourceClientConfig model.
app/Http/Resources/PocketExpenseFileUploadResource.php
API resource transformer for PocketExpenseFileUpload. Depends on PocketExpenseFileUpload model.
app/Http/Controllers/Api/V1/UserFeaturePermissionController.php
REST API controller for user permission management. Depends on UserFeaturePermissionService, FormRequests, Resources.
app/Http/Controllers/Api/V1/PocketExpenseController.php
REST API controller for expense CRUD operations. Depends on PocketExpenseService, PocketExpenseFXService, FormRequests, Resources.
app/Http/Controllers/Api/V1/PocketExpenseSourceController.php
REST API controller for expense source configuration. Depends on PocketExpenseSourceService, FormRequests, Resources.
app/Http/Controllers/PocketExpenseUploadController.php
API controller for CSV upload handling. Depends on PocketExpenseCSVValidator, ProcessExpenseUpload job.
routes/api.php
API route definitions with OAuth2 middleware groups. Depends on all controllers.
Full API spec:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: OOP Expense Management API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Laravel API for Out-of-Pocket Expense Management with User Permissions, CRUD Operations, and CSV Batch Upload
security:
  - OAuth2: []
paths:
  /api/v1/user-feature-permissions:
    get:
      summary: List user feature permissions
      parameters:
        - name: client_id
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        200:
          description: List of user feature permissions
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  data:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserFeaturePermission'
    post:
      summary: Create user feature permission
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/StoreUserFeaturePermissionRequest'
      responses:
        201:
          description: Permission created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  data:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserFeaturePermission'
  /api/v1/user-feature-permissions/{id}:
    get:
      summary: Show specific user feature permission
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        200:
          description: User feature permission details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  data:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserFeaturePermission'
    put:
      summary: Update user feature permission
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpdateUserFeaturePermissionRequest'
      responses:
        200:
          description: Permission updated successfully
    delete:
      summary: Delete user feature permission
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        204:
          description: Permission deleted successfully
  /api/v1/pocket-expenses:
    get:
      summary: List pocket expenses
      parameters:
        - name: client_id
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
        - name: user_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [draft, submitted, approved, rejected]
      responses:
        200:
          description: List of pocket expenses
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  data:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/PocketExpense'
    post:
      summary: Create pocket expense
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/StorePocketExpenseRequest'
      responses:
        201:
          description: Expense created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  data:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/PocketExpense'
  /api/v1/pocket-expenses/{id}:
    get:
      summary: Show specific pocket expense
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        200:
          description: Pocket expense details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  data:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/PocketExpense'
    put:
      summary: Update pocket expense
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpdatePocketExpenseRequest'
      responses:
        200:
          description: Expense updated successfully
    delete:
      summary: Delete pocket expense
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        204:
          description: Expense deleted successfully
  /api/v1/pocket-expense-sources:
    get:
      summary: List pocket expense sources
      parameters:
        - name: client_id
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        200:
          description: List of expense sources
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  data:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/PocketExpenseSource'
    post:
      summary: Create pocket expense source
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/StorePocketExpenseSourceRequest'
      responses:
        201:
          description: Source created successfully
  /api/v1/pocket-expense-sources/{id}:
    get:
      summary: Show specific expense source
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        200:
          description: Expense source details
    put:
      summary: Update expense source
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/UpdatePocketExpenseSourceRequest'
      responses:
        200:
          description: Source updated successfully
    delete:
      summary: Delete expense source
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
      responses:
        204:
          description: Source deleted successfully
  /api/uploads/pocket-expense/csv:
    post:
      summary: Upload CSV file for batch expense processing
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          multipart/form-data:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/UploadPocketExpenseCSVRequest'
      responses:
        200:
          description: CSV uploaded and validated successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  success:
                    type: boolean
                  message:
                    type: string
                  upload_id:
                    type: integer
                  total_rows:
                    type: integer
        422:
          description: CSV validation failed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  success:
                    type: boolean
                  message:
                    type: string
                  upload_id:
                    type: integer
                  total_rows:
                    type: integer
                  error_count:
                    type: integer
                  errors:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: object
                      properties:
                        line_number:
                          type: integer
                        field:
                          type: string
                        error:
                          type: string
                        value:
                          type: string
components:
  schemas:
    UserFeaturePermission:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        user_id:
          type: integer
        client_id:
          type: integer
        feature_id:
          type: integer
        grantor_id:
          type: integer
        manager_user_id:
          type: integer
        is_enabled:
          type: boolean
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
    PocketExpense:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        uuid:
          type: string
        user_id:
          type: integer
        client_id:
          type: integer
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
        merchant_name:
          type: string
        merchant_description:
          type: string
        expense_type:
          type: integer
        currency:
          type: string
        amount:
          type: number
          format: decimal
        merchant_address:
          type: string
        vat_amount:
          type: number
          format: decimal
        notes:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [draft, submitted, approved, rejected]
        created_by_user_id:
          type: integer
        updated_by_user_id:
          type: integer
        approved_by_user_id:
          type: integer
        create_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        update_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        deleted:
          type: boolean
        delete_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
    PocketExpenseSource:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
        uuid:
          type: string
        client_id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        is_default:
          type: boolean
        deleted:
          type: boolean
        delete_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        create_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        update_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
    StoreUserFeaturePermissionRequest:
      type: object
      required:
        - target_user_id
        - client_id
        - feature_id
      properties:
        target_user_id:
          type: integer
        client_id:
          type: integer
        feature_id:
          type: integer
        manager_user_id:
          type: integer
        is_enabled:
          type: boolean
    UpdateUserFeaturePermissionRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        manager_user_id:
          type: integer
        is_enabled:
          type: boolean
    StorePocketExpenseRequest:
      type: object
      required:
        - client_id
        - date
        - merchant_name
        - expense_type
        - currency
        - amount
      properties:
        client_id:
          type: integer
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
        merchant_name:
          type: string
        merchant_description:
          type: string
        expense_type:
          type: integer
        currency:
          type: string
        amount:
          type: number
          format: decimal
        merchant_address:
          type: string
        vat_amount:
          type: number
          format: decimal
        notes:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [draft, submitted, approved, rejected]
    UpdatePocketExpenseRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
        merchant_name:
          type: string
        merchant_description:
          type: string
        expense_type:
          type: integer
        currency:
          type: string
        amount:
          type: number
          format: decimal
        merchant_address:
          type: string
        vat_amount:
          type: number
          format: decimal
        notes:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [draft, submitted, approved, rejected]
    StorePocketExpenseSourceRequest:
      type: object
      required:
        - client_id
        - name
      properties:
        client_id:
          type: integer
        name:
          type: string
        is_default:
          type: boolean
    UpdatePocketExpenseSourceRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        is_default:
          type: boolean
    UploadPocketExpenseCSVRequest:
      type: object
      required:
        - file
        - user_id
        - expense_user_id
        - client_id
      properties:
        file:
          type: string
          format: binary
        user_id:
          type: integer
        expense_user_id:
          type: integer
        client_id:
          type: integer
  securitySchemes:
    OAuth2:
      type: oauth2
      flows:
        clientCredentials:
          tokenUrl: /oauth/token
          scopes: {}
Shared Knowledge: All models use Volopa legacy timestamp pattern (create_time, update_time) and flag-based soft delete (deleted, delete_time). The existing Oauth2UserClient middleware handles authentication at route group level. FX conversion service integrates with existing platform FX infrastructure using 30-day lookback and commission calculation. CSV validation uses all-or-nothing approach with synchronous validation followed by background processing. User permission system supports role-based access with delegation capabilities where Admins can grant access to their managed users. All data operations are scoped by client_id for multi-tenancy. Standard Laravel patterns: Form Requests for validation, Policies for authorization, API Resources for response transformation, Services for business logic.
Anything UNCLEAR: Four project-level decisions need clarification: 1) Notification channel preference for batch upload completion (in-app notification, email, push notification, or combination) - this affects the ProcessExpenseUpload job implementation but doesn't block core development. 2) Whether the FX conversion with wallet-ccy-value endpoint + 30-day lookback + commission calculation is reusing an existing platform service or requires new integration setup - this is referenced as existing infrastructure but the specific debounce + lookback + commission pattern may be new. 3) Audit logging mechanism for permission grants/revokes - whether to use a platform-standard audit system, separate audit table, event sourcing, or Laravel activity log. 4) Exact ClientFeatures model query pattern to check if a client has feature_id = 16 (OOP Expense) enabled - the model exists but the backing table and query structure need confirmation. These decisions affect implementation details but core API development can proceed with reasonable assumptions.
